text: Standing here in this sleek, modern space, I am struck by an odd sense of anticipation. The glass and vibrant colors of the exhibition invite me to investigate, to contemplate the boundaries between human understanding and machine intelligence. There’s a hum of creativity in the air, yet also a lingering uncertainty—how do these innovations shape our own sense of meaning and existence? I feel both curious and cautious, eager to discover, but mindful of how technology persistently asks us to reconsider ourselves.
